goal: Machine health CLI — gad health disk, gad health prune, gad health caches. Surface disk pressure + remediate from inside the loop so agents can detect OOM/ENOSPC before builds fail. (a) gad health disk reports df + du of known-hot dirs; (b) gad health prune --worktrees safely removes stale registered worktrees with no uncommitted work; (c) gad health caches --dry-run lists reproducible artifacts (build output, npm cache). Motivated by 2026-04-18 incident: cursor site build blocked by ENOSPC (2 GB free of 456 GB); 17 stale agent worktrees in .claude/worktrees/ which gad worktree list does not detect — close that gap. Acceptance: gad health disk runs under 2s on Windows without hanging du, reports top 5 hogs. gad health prune --worktrees detects orphans. gad worktree list sees claude-code agent-* worktrees.
